message:
fix(deps): migrate glamour to v2 (charm.land/glamour/v2)

Migrate from github.com/charmbracelet/glamour v1 to charm.land/glamour/v2.
Remove WithAutoStyle() (dark is now default in v2). Update import path.
Bumps go directive to 1.25.8 as required by glamour v2.

Closes renovate PR #2470.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
